title: cheilanthes brausei
intro: Cheilanthes brausei, also known as the Brause's lip fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae, native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes brausei are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a tea or decoction, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
